assertions.assertion: A Document class/record is defined with at least Department and OwnerId properties
assertions.rationale: Document class has Department, OwnerId, Id, and Title properties.

assertions.assertion: An Operations class is defined with static OperationAuthorizationRequirement fields for Read and Edit
assertions.rationale: Operations class has static Read and Edit fields of type OperationAuthorizationRequirement.

assertions.assertion: The Read operation checks the user's 'department' claim against the resource's Department property
The Edit operation checks the user's 'sub' claim against the resource's OwnerId property
assertions.rationale: Edit branch compares context.User.FindFirst("sub")?.Value with resource.OwnerId.
